name: UAE Pavilion
summary: The UAE pavilion is expected to showcase sustainable energy and smart-city innovation, and to work as a business bridge between Emirati companies and Serbian enterprises — with a dedicated National Day of Emirati culture.

about: The UAE — a major backer of Belgrade's wider development projects — is expected to bring a pavilion showcasing innovations in sustainable energy and smart cities, featuring what coverage describes as cutting-edge innovations in sustainability and technology. Beyond the showcase, the pavilion is framed as a bridge connecting Emirati companies with Serbian enterprises.

The UAE will have a dedicated National Day at Expo 2027 featuring cultural showcases such as traditional Emirati music or sports events. A Serbian Expo advisor told Gulf News the entire event will reflect the partnership: "the entire EXPO 2027 will be a showcase because without the support of our friends from UAE, this event simply would not be as successful". Pavilion design and budget have not been announced.

facts.label: Expected focus
facts.value: Sustainable energy, smart cities, technology showcase

facts.label: Business angle
facts.value: Bridge between Emirati companies and Serbian enterprises

facts.label: National Day
facts.value: Dedicated day with Emirati cultural showcases

facts.label: Commissioner General
facts.value: H.E. Ahmed Hatem Almenhali, Ambassador of the UAE to Serbia

quotes.quote: We would be glad to see leading UAE companies expand their presence in Serbia or find new markets through Expo 2027.
quotes.who: CEO of Expo 2027 Ltd (as reported by Gulf News)

faqs.question: What will the UAE Pavilion showcase at Expo 2027?
faqs.answer: Coverage points to innovations in sustainable energy and smart cities — cutting-edge sustainability and technology — with the pavilion also framed as a business bridge connecting Emirati companies with Serbian enterprises.

faqs.question: Will the UAE have a National Day at Expo 2027?
faqs.answer: Yes — a dedicated National Day featuring Emirati cultural showcases such as traditional music or sports events.

faqs.question: Is the UAE pavilion design or budget public?
faqs.answer: No — neither has been announced as of mid-2026. The UAE is also one of the major backers of Belgrade's wider development projects around the Expo.

sources.note: Gulf News on the UAE at Expo 2027
